data.overview: Vào đầu những năm 2000, Yoo Young-chul đã dùng búa đập chết nạn nhân của mình và gieo rắc nỗi sợ hãi khắp Seoul. Kho tài liệu này kể lại cuộc săn lùng một kẻ giết người sung mãn.

data.biography: Kensho Ono is a Japanese actor, voice actor and singer affiliated with Animo Produce. On July 8, 2020, he announced his marriage to voice actress Kana Hanazawa.
data.name: Kensho Ono

data.biography: 小野贤章，日本男演员、配音员、歌手。福冈县出生、东京都出身。高170厘米，重52公斤，A型血。以前属剧团向日葵系列的砂冈事务所，2012年9月30日退出了加入约14年的砂冈事务所，目前属Animo Produce事务所。童星出身，舞台、电影、电视、广告都有涉足。不过最为人知晓的还是《哈利波特》系列（哈利·波特）配音，《黑子的篮球》黑子哲也配音。
data.name: 小野贤章

data.biography: Kensho Ono (小野 賢章, Ono Kenshō, nacido el 5 octubre de 1989) es un actor, actor de doblaje y cantante japonés de la ciudad de Fukuoka que está afiliado a Animo Produce. El 8 de julio de 2020, anunció su matrimonio con la actriz de doblaje Kana Hanazawa.
data.name: Kensho Ono

data.biography: 小野賢章是日本的男性聲優、演員、歌手。出生於福岡縣福岡市、成長於東京都，所屬公司為 Animo Produce。
data.name: 小野賢章

data.biography: Kensho Ono (小野賢章), né le 05 octobre 1989, est un acteur, doubleur et chanteur japonais affilié à l'agence Animo Produce. Le 8 juillet 2020, il a annoncé son mariage avec la doubleuse Kana Hanazawa.
data.name: Kensho Ono

data.biography: Yu Shimamura (嶋村 侑, Shimamura Yū) is a Japanese voice actress from Tokyo, Japan. She was formerly affiliated with Office Kaoru from 2005–08 and is now affiliated with Ken Production. She has had main roles in several anime shows including as Akiko in Bungo Stray Dogs, Haruka Haruno / Cure Flora in Go! Princess PreCure, Toru Takagami in Our Home's Fox Deity, and Faylin in Tanken Driland Sennen no Maho. She provides supporting character voices for Annie Leonhart in Attack on Titan, Kaoru in Aldnoah.Zero, and Aida in Gundam Reconguista in G. Her work in video games includes voicing Princess Zelda in The Legend of Zelda: Skyward Sword and The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild.
data.name: Yu Shimamura

data.biography:
Néstor Igor Cantillana (born July 19, 1975 in Santiago) is a Chilean actor in theater, movies and TV. He made his debut in the Soap Opera world in the role of Patricio Tepano in Iorana (1998) from TVN, he then performed some other characters, among them, an AIDS victim, a common employee, a frustrated detective and a young homosexual doctor.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Néstor Cantillana, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Néstor Cantillana

data.biography:
Rie Kugimiya is a Japanese singer and voice actress affiliated with I'm Enterprise.  Some of Kugimiya's most prominent roles include Alphonse Elric in the Fullmetal Alchemist series, Kagura in Gin Tama, and Happy in Fairy Tail. Because of her voicing of lead characters such as Shana in Shakugan no Shana, Louise in The Familiar of Zero, Nagi Sanzenin in Hayate the Combat Butler, Taiga Aisaka in Toradora!, and Aria Holmes Kanzaki in Aria the Scarlet Ammo, some of her fans have nicknamed her the "Queen of Tsundere."

Within the Tamagotchi fandom she is known for her role in the Tamagotchi movies and anime as Mametchi. She has also contributed her voice to various merchandise such as Mugen Puchipuchi Moe, a virtual keychain bubble-wrap popping game.

She was nominated for Best Actress in Leading Role in the first Seiyu Awards for the role of Louise in The Familiar of Zero and for Best Actress in Supporting Role for the role of Kagura in Gintama, and jointly won Best Actress in a Supporting Role with Mitsuki Saiga at the second Seiyu Awards. Kugimiya won Best Actress in the third Seiyu Awards for the roles as Taiga Aisaka in Toradora! and her work in Nabari no Ou
data.name: Rie Kugimiya

data.biography:
钉宫理惠（日语：釘宮 理恵／くぎみや りえ Kugimiya Rie，1979年5月30日—），日本女性声优。隶属于I'm Enterprise经纪公司。大阪府出生，成长于熊本县熊本市。身高159公分，血型B型。

知名的演出角色有水濑伊织（偶像大师）、夏娜（灼眼的夏娜）、露易丝（零之使魔）、片桐优姬（夕阳染红的坡道）、阿尔冯斯·爱力克（钢之炼金术师）、三千院凪（旋风管家）、逢坂大河（TIGER×DRAGON！龙与虎）、神乐（银魂）、哈比（妖精的尾巴、EDENS ZERO）、神崎·H·亚莉亚（绯弹的亚莉亚）等。
data.name: 钉宫理惠

data.biography: 釘宮理惠是日本的女性聲優、歌手。出生於大阪府，成長於熊本縣熊本市，所屬公司為 I'm Enterprise。
data.name: 釘宮理惠

data.biography:
Rie Kugimiya (釘宮 理恵, Rie Kugimiya, nacida el 30 de mayo de 1979) es una cantante y actriz de doblaje (seiyuu) japonesa de Osaka que está afiliada a I'm Enterprise. Algunos de los papeles más destacados de Kugimiya incluyen a Alphonse Elric en la serie Fullmetal Alchemist, Kagura en Gintama y Happy en Fairy Tail. Debido a dobla a personajes principales como Shana en Shakugan no Shana, Louise en The Familiar of Zero, Nagi Sanzenin en Hayate the Combat Butler, Taiga Aisaka en Toradora! y Aria Holmes Kanzaki en Aria the Scarlet Ammo, algunos de sus fanes la apodan la Reina del Tsundere.

Dentro del fandom de Tamagotchi es conocida por su papel en las películas y anime de Tamagotchi como Mametchi. También ha contribuido con su voz a varios productos como Mugen Puchipuchi Moe, un juego virtual de hacer estallar plástico de burbujas con llaveros.

Fue nominada a Mejor Actriz de Reparto en los primeros Premios Seiyu por el papel de Louise en The Familiar of Zero y a Mejor Actriz de Reparto por el papel de Kagura en Gintama. En la segunda edición de los Premios Seiyu, compartió el premio a la Mejor Actriz de Reparto con Mitsuki Saiga. Kugimiya ganó el premio a la Mejor Actriz en la tercera edición de los Premios Seiyu por sus papeles de Taiga Aisaka en Toradora! y su trabajo en Nabari no Ou.
data.name: Rie Kugimiya
ริเอะ คูงิมิยะ
